# Azion Docs — account

> All pages of the account section. Root index: https://www.azion.com/en/llms.txt

- [Explore Azion Accounts](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/): Manage your account, user permissions, teams, Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA), Single Sign-On (SSO), and subscribe to Azion products.
- [How to check Account Lockout Policy logs](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/guides/account-lockout-policy-logs/): This guide walks you through checking the logs generated by Account Lockout Policy.
- [How to configure your account](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/guides/account-settings/): Find out how to use Account Settings on Azion.
- [How to access Activity History](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/guides/activity-history/): Find out how to use Activity History on Azion Console.
- [How to access Billing](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/guides/billing-and-subscriptions/): Find out how to use Billing on Azion Console.
- [Manage Conditional Access by IP Address](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/guides/conditional-access-by-ip-address/): This policy allows you to create lists that will enable access to your resources based on specific IP addresses.
- [How to configure Account Lockout Policy](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/guides/configure-account-lockout-policy/): This guide walks you through configuring the Account Lockout Policy to protect your account from unauthorized access.
- [How to configure User Session Timeout](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/guides/configure-user-session-timeout/): This guide walks you through configuring the User Session Timeout policy to protect your account from unauthorized access.
- [How to use the "+ Create" button](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/guides/create-button/): The "+ Create" button accelerates your journey to start building with Azion.
- [How to delete your account](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/guides/delete-account/): Find out how to delete an account on Azion.
- [Getting to know Azion Console](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/guides/getting-to-know-azion-console/): This documentation will assist you to Get started and walk your first steps on Azion.
- [How to access Azion Console](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/guides/how-to-access-azion-console/): This documentation will assist you to access Azion's interface and explore the products and resources.
- [Enable Microsoft Entra User Provisioning (SCIM)](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/guides/microsoft-entra-automated-user-provisioning/): Hands-on to allow Microsoft to Entra Automated User Provisioning for Azion's platform.
- [How to enable Multi-Factor Authentication](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/guides/multi-factor-authentication/): Find out how to use Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) on Azion.
- [How to manage a personal token](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/guides/personal-tokens/): Find out how to use Personal Tokens on Azion.
- [Use Google SAML as an Identity Provider (IdP)](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/guides/sso-google-saml/): Hands-on to configure Google custom SAML app as an IdP for Azion's platform.
- [Use Microsoft Entra SAML as an IdP](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/guides/sso-microsoft-entra-saml/): Hands-on to configure Microsoft Entra custom SAML app as an IdP for Azion's platform.
- [Use Okta SAML as an Identity Provider (IdP)](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/guides/sso-okta-saml/): Hands-on guide on how to configure an Okta custom SAML application as an IdP for Azion's platform.
- [SSO](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/guides/sso/): Find out how to use SSO on Azion.
- [How to manage teams with Teams Permissions](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/guides/teams-permissions/): Find out how to use Teams Permissions on Azion.
- [Unlock a User from Account Lockout Policy](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/guides/unlock-account-lockout-policy/): This guide walks you through manually unlocking a user from the  Account Lockout Policy and guarantee access.
- [How to manage users with Users Management](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/guides/users-management/): Find out how to use Users Management on Azion.
- [Verify Your Account Migration to API v4](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/guides/verify-account-migration/): During the [Transition to API v4](/en/documentation/devtools/api/v4-migration/) you might see some pages with different versions for v3 and v4. This guide helps you verify if your account has already beed migrated to v4.
- [Account Lockout Policy](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/reference/account-lockout-policy/): The Account Lockout Policy feature protects accounts from unauthorized access, including brute force attacks.
- [Account Settings](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/reference/account-settings/): You can edit general information about your account on the Account Settings page on Azion.
- [Accounts](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/reference/accounts/): Azion allows you to create separate accounts, called Clients, for each of the affiliates in your group of companies.
- [Activity History](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/reference/activity-history/): On Azion, you can access the history of all activities performed on the account and by all the users connected to the main account.
- [Billing](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/reference/billing-and-subscriptions/): Basic setups to understand Azion billing process and keep an account active.
- [How to create an account on Azion](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/reference/creating-account/): Basic setups to create an account on Azion using an email address and through Social Login.
- [Multi-Factor Authentication](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/reference/multi-factor-authentication/): Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) is an electronic verification method used to secure logins.
- [Personal Tokens](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/reference/personal-tokens/): Personal Tokens are a string of characters used to authenticate your user and access to certain interfaces and tools.
- [Single Sign-On](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/reference/single-sign-on/): Azion allows account owners configure user logins with either Azion's SSO or an external Identity Provider of their choice.
- [Social Login](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/reference/social-login/): It uses existing information from a social network to log in to third-party sites without the need to create a new login account.
- [Teams Permissions](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/reference/teams-permissions/): On the Team Permissions page, you can create, manage teams, control, and configure access rights for distinct teams within your organization.
- [User Session Timeout](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/reference/user-session-timeout/): The User Session Timeout feature allows you to define a maximum session timeout for users in your organization.
- [Users Management](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/reference/users-management/): The Users Management functionality on Azion gives you tools to efficiently manage users in your account.
- [Your Settings](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/account/reference/your-settings/): On the Your Settings page, you can edit your personal information on Azion.
